THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, MING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HACKETT, CYRIL A $13,495.33 PRINCIPAL, $4,252.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,000.00 DAMAGES FOR INCONVENIENCE OF PLAINTIFF., TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,747.83, SEE SCANNED DOC.
